opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I ate something cross-contaminated, and I've been on the toilet with severe cramps and diarrhea for 6 hours; I feel like I'm going to pass out.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I've had non-stop watery diarrhoea and cramps for six hours after a restaurant meal, I can't keep fluids down, and I feel faint when I stand — I'm on my own and scared.

symptom_narrative.onset: a few hours after a restaurant meal today that I think was cross-contaminated with gluten
symptom_narrative.duration: about six hours of constant diarrhoea and cramps
symptom_narrative.character: watery, explosive diarrhoea with gripping cramps around my belly button
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe — I can't get off the toilet and I feel like I'll faint
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: cramps all around the middle of my belly, around the belly button
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, every few minutes I need the toilet
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: trying to move or drink makes the nausea worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: awful nausea so I can't drink, feeling really weak, dizzy and lightheaded when I stand
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had flares like this before when I've been glutened, but this one feels worse and I can't keep fluids in
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm stuck between the bed and bathroom and can't safely stand for long

past_medical_history.how_managed: strict gluten-free diet, usually well controlled

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own and there's no one here tonight to help me if I collapse getting to the bathroom

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading while unwell; low-normal and may drop further with standing
